caption: A woman with short black hair and glasses speaks against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green patterned tunic with a decorative neckline and a thin black necklace. A small black clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a logo featuring a stylized yellow sun-like icon and the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a centered medium shot, gesturing slightly as she talks. Her facial expressions shift as she speaks, with her mouth moving to articulate words and her eyes blinking, closing briefly in one instance. The lighting remains consistent, focusing on the subject while the background remains dark and void of other objects or people.
